ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* The invoice number */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the invoice was generated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the invoice */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, canceled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., standard, express) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "invoice_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice this item belongs to */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item purchased */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the item */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "sub_total" TEXT /* Sub-total amount for the item (quantity * unit_price - discount + tax) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES products ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred contact method (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., retail, business) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Unique stock code for each product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., kitchenware, home decor) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., width, height, depth) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice associated with the sale */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale occurred */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping for the sale */,
  "tax_total" TEXT /* Total tax for the sale */,
  "discount_total" TEXT /* Total discount for the sale */,
  "net_amount" TEXT /* Net amount of the sale (total_amount - discount_total + tax_total + shipping_cost) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory change */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the product affected */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., sale, restock) */,
  "quantity_change" INTEGER /* Quantity changed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the inventory change occurred (e.g., warehouse A, warehouse B) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the inventory change (e.g., sale, return, damage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES products ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the country */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Default tax rate for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sales" (
  "product_sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product's sales data */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Stock code of the product */,
  "total_sales" TEXT /* Total sales amount for the product */,
  "total_quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Total quantity sold of the product */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average price at which the product was sold */,
  "last_sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sale for the product */,
  "top_customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the most purchases of this product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sales_top_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sales_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES products ("stock_code")
)
